entities.name: CERAMSITE FLOATING BED
entities.description: A novel floating bed made from ceramsite used in aquaculture ponds to regulate water quality and improve production

entities.name: AQUACULTURE PONDS
entities.description: The environment where the ceramsite floating bed is applied

entities.name: WATER QUALITY
entities.description: The chemical, physical, and biological characteristics of water in the ponds

entities.name: PHYTOPLANKTON
entities.description: Microscopic plants that drift in the water

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Single-celled microorganisms

entities.name: FISH
entities.description: The aquatic animals being produced in the aquaculture ponds

entities.name: FISH GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in size and weight of fish

entities.name: TRANSPARENCY
entities.description: A measure of water clarity

entities.name: AMMONIA NITROGEN
entities.description: A chemical parameter of water quality (NH4+-N)

entities.name: TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: A chemical parameter of water quality (TN)

entities.name: TOTAL PHOSPHATE
entities.description: A chemical parameter of water quality (TP)

entities.name: PHYTOPLANKTON SPECIES DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of phytoplankton species present

entities.name: BACTERIAL NUMBER
entities.description: The quantity of bacteria present

entities.name: METABOLIC ACTIVITY
entities.description: The rate of chemical reactions within the microorganisms

entities.name: MICROBIAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of microorganisms present

entities.name: FEED CONVERSION RATIO
entities.description: The efficiency with which fish convert feed into body mass (FCR)

entities.name: FISH YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of fish produced per unit area

entities.name: SURVIVAL RATE
entities.description: The percentage of fish that survive to the end of the growth stage

entities.name: HARMFUL ALGAL BLOOMS
entities.description: Rapid increase or accumulation in the population of algae that can be toxic

entities.name: MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: General term for bacteria and other microscopic organisms
